description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, report, package and integration, define variables M2_CACHED_REPOSITORY, M2_STAGING_DIRECTORY and YARN_CACHE_DIRECTORY, and configure Maven cache at $M2_CACHED_REPOSITORY and Yarn cache at $YARN_CACHE_DIRECTORY. In the build stage add a build-backend job using the maven:3-jdk-8-alpine image that runs `maven --projects backend --also-make versions:lock-snapshots`, `maven_build --projects backend --also-make deploy | grep -vE "^INFO  \[.*\] liquibase.*$"`, and `maven --projects backend --also-make com.webcohesion.enunciate:enunciate-slim-maven-plugin:docs && mv backend/target/site/apidocs backend-apidocs || true`, caches Maven, stores backend-apidocs and all **/target as artifacts for 1 week, and is excluded for paths matching ^front/.*$; a build-frontend job using the node‑java‑yarn image (registry.gitlab.com/linagora/node-java-yarn-docker:n10-j8) that runs `cd frontend && time yarn run build:product:ci && mv dist ../frontend-dist && du --human-readable --summarize ../frontend-dist`, caches Yarn, produces frontend-dist artifact for 1 week, and excludes ^front/.*$ and ^back/.*$; a build-frontend-pages job (same image) that runs `cd frontend && time yarn run build:demo:ci && mv dist ../frontend-demo || true && du --human-readable --summarize ../frontend-demo || true`, runs only on master, caches Yarn and stores frontend-demo for 1 day; and a check-frontend job (same image) that runs `cd frontend && time yarn run check`, caches Yarn and is excluded for back/*, product/* and tags. Also in the build stage add three test-frontend jobs (test-frontend-0, test-frontend-1, test-frontend-2) using the same node image that each execute a series of yarn commands to run tests, build with or without LDAP, start a temporary http server, run Cypress e2e tests, clean up the server, cache Yarn, and are excluded for back/*, product/* and tags, with test-frontend-0 collecting coverage at frontend/coverage/lcov.info as a 1‑week artifact. In the report stage add sonar-backend (maven image) that runs `maven_build --file backend/pom.xml sonar:sonar -Dsonar.projectKey=petals-cockpit-backend`, allows failure and runs only on master, and sonar-frontend (node image) that runs `cd frontend && yarn run sonar-scanner -Dsonar.host.url=$SONAR_HOST_URL`, also allows failure and runs only on master. In the package stage add package-product (maven image) that depends on build-backend and build-frontend, runs the shared script `mv frontend-dist frontend/dist`, `maven dependency:purge-local-repository --non-recursive -DmanualInclude="org.ow2.petals:petals-cockpit-server,org.ow2.petals:petals-cockpit-parent" -DreResolve=false -DsnapshotsOnly=true`, `maven --projects cockpit verify antrun:run@build-product-dist`, extracts COCKPIT_VERSION from the built jar, writes it to version.txt, moves the distribution to petals-cockpit-$COCKPIT_VERSION, caches Maven and creates an artifact named petals-cockpit-$(cat version.txt)-${CI_BUILD_REF:0:7} containing the built capsule, running on all branches except master, tags and front/back paths; a package-product-master job with the same script that runs only on master, and a release-product job with the same script that runs only on tags and names the artifact petals-cockpit-$(cat version.txt). Finally add a pages job using alpine:3.6 that moves frontend-demo to public, backend-apidocs to public/apidocs, allows failure, runs only on master, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
